workContext.title: Introduce explicit schema_version envelopes and compatibility validation for every authoritative shared-coordination payload, including the summary manifest, runtime descriptors, and the future task and claim shard payload shapes.
workContext.summary: Implement explicit schema_version/kind envelopes for the summary manifest, runtime descriptors, and the authoritative coordination object payloads, then gate readers with explicit upgrade-required diagnostics.
workContext.planTitle: Implement shared coordination v1 architecture hardening
